security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first personal memory for AI tools
bundle.longDescription: Search and ground AI conversations in your own documents. All data stays on your machine.
